language.title: Introduction
language.p: This section presents documents that help you understand what AI is, how it works, and why SUSE AI is the right product for your locally hosed AI workloads.

language.title: Deployment
language.p: This section includes documents that describe how to install and upgrade the operating system components, such as hardware drivers or GPU related software.

language.title: Configuration
language.p: This section describes how to configure the SUSE AI product. Here you can find, for example, tasks related to configuring the OpenWebUI interface.

language.title: Additional Resources
language.p: Here you can find references to the documentation of the products and components that SUSE AI requires.
